title: leontodon autumnalis var. alpinus
intro: Leontodon autumnalis var. alpinus, also known as Alpine Hawkbit, is a variety of the autumnal Hawkbit plant, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Alpine Hawkbit include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
